args.content:
Hawaii Vacation Packing List

Based on the vacation itinerary for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024):

Essential Items:
- Swimwear (for beach days and snorkeling)
- Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike on June 13)
- Casual outfits (for daily activities)
- Camera (to capture memories)
- Travel documents (ID, tickets, reservations)

Additional Recommended Items:
- Snorkeling gear (if not renting)
- Water shoes
- Light jacket (for cooler evenings)
- Beach towel
- Reusable water bottle
- Hat and sunglasses
- Insect repellent
- First aid kit
- Phone charger and power bank

Special Items for Specific Activities:
- June 13 (Diamond Head Hike): Hiking shoes, water bottle, light backpack
- June 14 (Pearl Harbor): Respectful attire, camera
- June 16 (Luau): Aloha shirt or floral dress
- June 18 (Kayaking): Quick-dry clothing

Have a wonderful trip to Hawaii!
